management.title: CV Management
management.subtitle: Manage your professional resumes and optimize your profile strength

empty.headline: No resumes uploaded yet
empty.description: Elevate your executive presence. Upload your latest CV to start matching with premium leadership roles.

success.bannerDetail: {{filename}} has been saved to your secure profile vault.
success.addAnotherDesc: Drop your PDF here or click to browse files

error.fileFormatInvalid: Định dạng file không hỗ trợ hoặc dung lượng vượt quá 5MB. Vui lòng kiểm tra lại yêu cầu của hệ thống.

tips.title: CV OPTIMIZATION TIPS
tips.addKeywordsDesc: Our AI detected missing industry terms like "PnL Management" and "Change Transformation".
tips.tailorRolesDesc: Generic resumes perform 40% worse in executive search filters. Create targeted versions.
tips.fileFormatsDesc: Use PDF for consistent formatting or DOCX for ATS compatibility.
tips.fileSizeDesc: Keep your file under 5MB to ensure fast loading for recruiters.

bestPractices.title: CV BEST PRACTICES
bestPractices.privacyDesc: Your CV visibility is currently set to Confidential. Only verified recruiters matching your seniority level and preferred industries can request access to your full details.
privacyItems: You can set specific companies to "Block List" in settings.
Control exactly what personal data is shared initially.
practicesItems: Quantify results with revenue, growth %, or team size.
Keep your executive summary under 200 words.
Focus on the last 10 years of your career path.

premiumServices.auditDesc: Get a comprehensive analysis of your resume by our senior executive coaches.
premiumServices.reviewDesc: Get a professional 1:1 review of your CV by a Headhunter to maximize your reach.

validation.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 5MB.
validation.invalidFileFormat: File format not supported. Please use PDF, DOC, DOCX, or RTF.
validation.maxFilesReached: You've reached the maximum number of resumes
validation.deleteExistingToUpload: Delete an existing one to upload a new version.

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this resume?

tips.bestPracticeTip1: Quantify results with revenue, growth %, or team size.
tips.bestPracticeTip2: Keep your executive summary under 200 words.
tips.bestPracticeTip3: Focus on the last 10 years of your career path.
tips.privacyTip1: Take full command of your visibility. Choose who can view your credentials: keep them private, open to all verified recruiters, or only visible to targeted executive firms.
tips.privacyTip2: Optimize your impact. Use clean, professional formatting and ensure your executive summary highlights measurable ROI to stand out to global search partners.
tips.privacyTip3: Focus on the last 10 years of your career path, emphasizing your leadership impact and strategic accomplishments.
tips.optimizationTitle: Implement these tips to improve your CV match rate
tips.uploadPlaceholder: Drag and drop your professional CV here or click to browse files from your computer.
tips.profileStrengthHint: Complete remaining items to improve your profile visibility.
